contents.value:
## `--extra-filesystem-space`

This option is a Wic-specific option that adds extra space after the space filled by the content of the partition. The final size can exceed the size specified by the `--size` option. The default value is 10M. Specify as an integer value optionally followed by one of the units "k"/"K" for kibibyte, "M" for mebibyte and "G" for gibibyte. The default unit if none is given is "M".
